docs.title: DocsUpdater - Technical Documentation
docs.text:
Welcome to the project documentation. This site is automatically maintained — sprint updates from Linear are reviewed and merged via pull requests.

  • :material-book-open-outline: Overview

    Project purpose, scope, and getting started guide.

    :octicons-arrow-right-24: Overview

  • :material-sitemap: Architecture

    System design, component diagrams, and tech stack.

    :octicons-arrow-right-24: Architecture

  • :material-api: API Reference

    Endpoint documentation, authentication, and examples.

    :octicons-arrow-right-24: API Reference

  • :material-clipboard-check-outline: Business Requirements

    Business context, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

    :octicons-arrow-right-24: Requirements

  • :material-history: Sprint Changelog

    Auto-generated log of completed sprint work.

    :octicons-arrow-right-24: Changelog

  • :material-book-cog-outline: Runbooks

    Operational procedures and deployment guides.

    :octicons-arrow-right-24: Runbooks

docs.title: GET /api/v1/resource
docs.text:
Returns a list of resources.

Parameters:

Name Type Required Description limit int No Max results (default 20) offset int No Pagination offset

Response:

{
  "data": [],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 20,
  "offset": 0
}

docs.title: Sprint Changelog
docs.text:
Auto-Updated

This section is automatically maintained by the DocsUpdater n8n workflow. Each sprint, completed tickets from Linear are summarized and appended here as a pull request for review.
